positive: A highly detailed, intricate stylized illustration of a celestial fox head and surrounding crescent moons and constellations. The artwork must be rendered in a neo-tribal, geometric linework style, combining fine line engravings with bold, solid silhouettes. Use a limited, contrasting color palette of deep sapphire blues, ethereal gold, muted turquoise, and charcoal black. The composition must be centrally focused and perfectly symmetrical, suitable for apparel printing. High contrast, crystal clear definition, perfect symmetry, mandala patterns, vaporwave aesthetic, graphic novel quality, vector illustration, on a clean white or solid black background.
negative: photorealism, messy, blurry, low resolution, grainy, artifact, noise, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, extra limbs, disfigured, bad anatomy, poor quality, over-saturated
